_comment: Agentic-dev preset - methodology gate (piece 2). POST to /rules. Advisory by default (FLAG/NOTIFY): hard structural invariants belong to the lifecycle layer; access control belongs to RBAC, not to spoofable approved_by rules. Concepts are verb-focused so 'create API' and 'deprecate API' don't collide under static embeddings.
dsl:
rule "new API - confirm reuse" priority 20
when
    sim(relation_type, "API_CREATION") > 0.4
then
    flag("New API proposed - confirm no existing capability already covers it (the action layer cites precedents; a role confirms).")
end

rule "deprecation needs a linked decision" priority 30
when
    sim(relation_type, "DEPRECATION") > 0.45
then
    flag("Interface deprecation - link the Decision (ADR) that authorizes it before it ships.")
end

rule "architecture decision needs rationale" priority 15
when
    sim(relation_type, "ARCHITECTURE") > 0.4
    and evidence_count < 1
then
    notify("Architecture decision recorded without supporting evidence - add rationale or links.")
end

rule "low-confidence capture needs confirmation" priority 10
when
    confidence < 0.5
then
    flag("Low-confidence auto-captured decision - a role should confirm it.")
end
